_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Statistical analyses for length (A), width (B), surface area (C) and volume (D) measurements were performed using the Friedman test and post hoc Dunn–Bonferroni tests... All analyses were conducted on IBM SPSS Statistics (ver. 27.01)
details: Successfully performed statistical analyses including Friedman tests, post hoc Dunn-Bonferroni tests, and Wilcoxon signed-rank tests for comparing imaging system measurements
